title: Sore Throat Soother
summary: This syrup is the ideal home remedy for when you’re fighting off a cold, with immune-boosting honey, ginger and garlic. Dissolve it into boiling water for a soothing hot drink or eat it directly from the jar. Feel better soon Mob.

method.description: Peel and quarter the shallot. Peel and gently bash the garlic and thinly slice the ginger.
Add all of the ingredients to a saucepan with ½ of the honey. Place over a medium heat and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer then leave for 6-7 mins to soften the ingredients and melt the honey.
Take it off the heat and let it cool down a little then stir through the remaining honey.
Store in an airtight jar in the fridge for up to 1 month. Dissolve 1 tbsp of the mixture in a mug of hot water or broth for a soothing hot drink, or eat it directly from the jar.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
